title: Error executing BTOR backend
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

File: [issue_design.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3214289/issue_design.tar.gz)


```
tar -xf issue_design.tar.gz  
cd issue_design 
yosys -s commands.ys
```

## Expected behavior
Execute btor backend of the design successfully. 

## Actual behavior
When the program tried to execute BTOR backend,  it found the error saying  “Assert `cell_recursion_guard.count(cell) == 0' failed in backends/btor/btor.cc:132.” . 

I tried to solve the problem and found the wire `csr_cmd` (line 129 in vscale_pipeline.v) may cause the error. This wire is the output from ctrl module and the input of the csr_file module. 
The wire is implemented as following in ctrl module (line 412 in vscale_ctrl.v):  
```csr_cmd = (kill_DX) ? `CSR_IDLE : csr_cmd_unkilled; ```  If I comment this line or change the line to  ``` assign csr_cmd = `CSR_IDLE ``` or  ``` assign csr_cmd = csr_cmd_unkilled ```, yosys could execute BTOR backend successfully. If I want to make csr_cmd dependent on kill_DX, I will get the same error. 

##
Please let me know if I can provide more information! Thank you for your help and all your work on Yosys!
